hint.invertMV.zh: 将选中线段的颜色在山（M）与谷（V）之间互换
hint.invertMV.en: Swap Mountain and Valley assignments on selected lines

hint.pan.zh: 按住拖拽移动画布 | 右键擦除 | 滚轮缩放
hint.pan.en: Drag to pan | Right-click erase | Scroll zoom

hint.move.zh: 从顶点/网格点拖拽已选线段 | 松手吸附端点/网格点
hint.move.en: Drag selected from vertex/grid | Release to snap

hint.copy.zh: 从顶点/网格点拖拽已选线段 | 松手复制到吸附点
hint.copy.en: Drag selected from vertex/grid | Release to copy

hint.mirror.zh: 点击两个点定义镜像轴
hint.mirror.en: Click two points to define mirror axis

hint.line.zh: 拖拽绘制 | 右键擦除 | 中键拖拽画布 | 滚轮缩放
hint.line.en: Drag to draw | Right-click erase | MMB pan | Scroll zoom

hint.rabbitEar.zh: 点击三个点，画出三角形角平分线 | 右键擦除
hint.rabbitEar.en: Click 3 points for triangle bisectors | Right-click erase

hint.extension.zh: 点击一条线延长，再点另一条线作为目标 | 右键擦除
hint.extension.en: Click line to extend, then click target line | Right-click erase

hint.perpendicular.zh: 点击一个点，再点一条线，过点作垂线 | 右键擦除
hint.perpendicular.en: Click point, then line for perpendicular | Right-click erase

hint.bisector.zh: 点模式：点1→点2(顶点)→点3→目标线 | 线模式：线1→线2→目标线 | 右键擦除
hint.bisector.en: Point: P1→P2(vertex)→P3→target | Line: L1→L2→target | Right-click erase

hint.parallel.zh: 点击点→参考线→目标线，过点作平行线交于目标线 | 右键擦除
hint.parallel.en: Click point→ref line→target line for parallel | Right-click erase

hint.flatFold.zh: 点击顶点 → 选择候选线 → 点击目标线 | 右键擦除
hint.flatFold.en: Click vertex → choose candidate → click target | Right-click erase

hint.selPoint.zh: 点击选择/取消 | Shift+加选 | Ctrl+反选切换 | 点击空白取消全部
hint.selPoint.en: Click to select/deselect | Shift+add | Ctrl+toggle | Click blank to clear

hint.selBox.zh: 拖拽框选 | Shift+加选 | Ctrl+反选切换 | 点击空白取消全部
hint.selBox.en: Drag box select | Shift+add | Ctrl+toggle | Click blank to clear

hint.selLasso.zh: 拖拽套索选择 | Shift+加选 | Ctrl+反选切换 | 点击空白取消全部
hint.selLasso.en: Drag lasso select | Shift+add | Ctrl+toggle | Click blank to clear

hint.selBrush.zh: 拖拽画笔扫过选中 | Shift+加选 | Ctrl+反选切换 | 点击空白取消全部
hint.selBrush.en: Drag brush to select | Shift+add | Ctrl+toggle | Click blank to clear

hint.selClear.zh: 取消所有线段的选中状态

hint.selInvert.zh: 反转所有线段的选中状态

hint.ersBrush.zh: 拖拽画笔预览后松手擦除
hint.ersBrush.en: Drag brush preview, release to erase

hint.drawLineTooltip.zh: 拖拽画一条直线，Shift 吸附 22.5°
hint.drawLineTooltip.en: Drag to draw a crease line, Shift snap 22.5°

hint.rabbitEarTooltip.zh: 依次点击三角形三个顶点，画出内心到三点的角平分线
hint.rabbitEarTooltip.en: Click 3 vertices of a triangle to draw incenter bisectors

hint.flatFoldTooltip.zh: 点击顶点 → 选择候选方向 → 点击目标线，添加使顶点可压平的折线
hint.flatFoldTooltip.en: Click vertex → choose direction → click target to add flat-foldable crease

hint.extensionTooltip.zh: 点击一条线延长，再点另一条线作为目标，延长至交点
hint.extensionTooltip.en: Click line to extend, then target line, extend to intersection

hint.perpendicularTooltip.zh: 点击一个点，再点一条线，过该点作垂线
hint.perpendicularTooltip.en: Click a point, then a line, draw perpendicular through point

hint.bisectorTooltip.zh: 点模式：点1→点2(顶点)→点3→目标线 / 线模式：线1→线2→目标线
hint.bisectorTooltip.en: Point mode: P1→P2(vertex)→P3→target / Line mode: L1→L2→target

hint.parallelTooltip.zh: 点击参考点 → 参考线 → 目标线，过点作平行线交于目标线
hint.parallelTooltip.en: Click ref point → ref line → target line, parallel through point

hint.cleanVertsTooltip.zh: 移除仅连接两条共线线段的冗余顶点
hint.cleanVertsTooltip.en: Remove redundant vertices with only 2 collinear lines

msg.unsaved.zh: 当前图案未保存，确定新建？

msg.unrecognizedJSON.zh: 无法识别的 JSON 格式

msg.cleanVertsDone.zh: 清理了 {0} 个冗余顶点

msg.noLinesToMirror.zh: 请先用选择工具选中要镜像的线段

msg.mirrorP1.zh: 已选轴心点1，点击第二个点完成镜像
msg.mirrorP1.en: Axis point 1 set, click second point

msg.noLinesToMove.zh: 请先用选择工具选中要移动的线段

msg.noLinesToCopy.zh: 请先用选择工具选中要复制的线段

msg.foldViolation.zh:
待折叠线段存在 {0} 个违例点。

折叠结果可能不正确。是否仍然继续？
msg.foldViolation.en:
{0} violations found.

Result may be incorrect. Continue?

msg.foldOpenVerts.zh:
选中线段未形成闭合区域（{0} 个开放端点）。

折叠模拟可能失败。是否仍然继续？
msg.foldOpenVerts.en:
Selection not closed ({0} open endpoints).

Fold may fail. Continue?

msg.foldNoFaces.zh: 折叠失败：无法提取面片（需要封闭的多边形区域）
msg.foldNoFaces.en: Fold failed: cannot extract faces (closed region required)

msg.foldDone.zh: 折叠完成：{0} 个面片{1}{2}{3}。中键拖拽移动折叠图
msg.foldDone.en: Fold done: {0} faces{1}{2}{3}. MMB drag to move result

msg.drawToCheck.en: Draw a line to start check

msg.help.zh: Ctrl+右键=饼菜单 | F=折叠 | Q=清理杂点 | 中键拖拽画布 | 滚轮缩放
msg.help.en: Ctrl+RMB=Pie Menu | F=Fold | Q=Clean Verts | MMB pan | Scroll zoom
